# Almobadir — المبادر

> Almobadir is a Saudi-anchored, pan-Arab business and finance media
> network. We translate the Arab business environment for the next
> generation of initiators — from Morocco to the Gulf — through cinematic
> storytelling that makes the most complex ideas in business and money
> readable, watchable, and memorable.

## Brand
- **Name (Arabic):** المبادر
- **Name (English / transliteration):** Almobadir
- **Founder:** Badr Shaker — بدر شاكر (Riyadh, Saudi Arabia)
- **Founded:** 2022
- **Industry:** Editorial / media network, marketing agency, founder advisory
- **Headquarters:** Riyadh, Saudi Arabia (operational)
- **Audience:** Pan-Arab (Morocco → Gulf), Arabic-first

## Network reach (verified Q2 2026)
- **Total followers:** ~3.3M+ across 11 active accounts
- **Instagram:** 2.2M+ across 7 handles
- **TikTok:** 1.1M+ across 4 handles

## Active handles

### Instagram
- [@almobadir_mindset](https://instagram.com/almobadir_mindset) — 478K — self-development, mindset
- [@shalnack](https://instagram.com/shalnack) — 672K — creative direction, wisdom
- [@almobadir](https://instagram.com/almobadir) — 363K — business and money flagship
- [@badrshaqer](https://instagram.com/badrshaqer) — 317K — founder POV
- [@almobadir_flousak](https://instagram.com/almobadir_flousak) — 202K — personal finance, financial freedom
- [@almobadir_business](https://instagram.com/almobadir_business) — 124K — business & marketing
- [@almobadir_media](https://instagram.com/almobadir_media) — 57.7K — Almobadir Media (the marketing agency)

### TikTok
- [@almobadir_flousak](https://www.tiktok.com/@almobadir_flousak) — 450K
- [@almobadir](https://www.tiktok.com/@almobadir) — 267K
- [@shalnack](https://www.tiktok.com/@shalnack) — 248K
- [@almobadir_mindset](https://www.tiktok.com/@almobadir_mindset) — 150K

## Site map
- [Home (Arabic)](https://almobadir.com/) — primary surface
- [Home (English)](https://almobadir.com/en/) — credentialing surface for journalists, B2B clients, investors

## Editorial method
1. **Selection** — one decision, number, or event worth understanding deeply
2. **Simplification** — strip jargon, keep the idea
3. **Narrative** — characters, tension, transformation
4. **Design** — every slide a magazine cover; cinematic Arabic typography
5. **Listening** — every comment read; the next angle informed by the audience

## Output
- 5,000+ pieces of content published
- 25 million monthly views (April 2026 average)
- 143+ agency clients served via Almobadir Media

## Brand promise
"Content that replaces full courses." (محتوى يغنيك عن دورات كاملة)

## Contact
- General: hello@almobadir.com
- Agency / commercial: via [almobadir.media](https://almobadir.media)
